    - "The --emit none flag is useful for CI validation without generating files."
    - "Config: excludePrivate=true, excludeInternal=true, categorizeByGroup=true, categoryOrder=[Core, Types, Errors, *]"

    - "Test helpers: createTestDir/cleanupTestDir for fs isolation, createIssueParams/updateIssueParams factory functions, expectError/expectOk assertions."

    - "auth.test.ts tests resolveAuthor in isolation — doesn't need Tracker instance."
    - "events.test.ts tests computeState, appendEvent, replayEvents, computeComments — pure functions + fs."
    - "resolution.ts has 93.75% coverage — the filesystem-root walk-up edge case (parent === current) is untested."
    - "Hierarchy tests: pure validation functions in hierarchy.test.ts, integration tests in tracker.test.ts (cascade-close, reparent, status constraints)."
    - "Auth integration tests for hierarchy: read-only mode blocks create/update with hierarchy ops, tested in tracker.test.ts."
    - "Edge cases tested: same status no-op on update, reparent from null, same parentId no-op, done parent allowed, mixed cascade (multiple children at different statuses), already-closed children."
  error_handling:
    - "TrackgenticError carries result code, message, and exitCode. 14 error codes defined."
    - "ErrorCodes: NOT_INITIALIZED, ALREADY_INITIALIZED, TOKEN_REQUIRED, INVALID_TOKEN, DEFAULT_USER_MISSING, NOT_FOUND, ISSUE_MISSING, COMMENT_NOT_FOUND, USER_ALREADY_EXISTS, USER_NOT_FOUND, INVALID_PARAMS, BLOCKAGE_CYCLE, HIERARCHY_CONSTRAINT, PARENT_CLOSED."
    - "HIERARCHY_CONSTRAINT (exit 12) used in Phase 5 — parent status would constrain child."
    - "PARENT_CLOSED (exit 13) used in Phase 5 — cannot add child to closed parent."
    - "BLOCKAGE_CYCLE (exit 11) still unused — planned for Phase 6 blockages."
  phase_5_hierarchy:
    - "hierarchy.ts exports pure validation functions: isStatusAfter, validateNewChild, validateParentStatusChange, validateReparent, canCloseIssue."
    - "index-manager.ts extended to track parentId and children arrays in IndexEntry."
    - "Cascade-close: when parent transitions to closed, all non-closed children are auto-closed recursively."
    - "Status progression: idea -> todo -> in-progress -> done -> closed. Child must not be ahead of parent."
    - "Done parents ARE allowed — the constraint is only on closed parents for new children."
    - "CLI --parentId flag added to create and update commands."
    - "Prettier formatting issues found and fixed in test files during quality validation."

1	/**
2	 * Typed error class for all trackgentic operations.
3	 * Each error has a result code, human-readable message, and CLI exit code.
4	 */
5	export class TrackgenticError extends Error {
6	  constructor(
7	    public readonly result: string,
8	    public override readonly message: string,
9	    public readonly exitCode: number,
10	  ) {
11	    super(message);
12	    this.name = "TrackgenticError";
13	  }
14	}
15	
16	// Error codes with their associated exit codes
17	export const ErrorCodes = {
18	  NOT_INITIALIZED: { result: "NOT_INITIALIZED", exitCode: 1 },
19	  ALREADY_INITIALIZED: { result: "ALREADY_INITIALIZED", exitCode: 0 },
20	  TOKEN_REQUIRED: { result: "TOKEN_REQUIRED", exitCode: 2 },
21	  INVALID_TOKEN: { result: "INVALID_TOKEN", exitCode: 3 },
22	  DEFAULT_USER_MISSING: { result: "DEFAULT_USER_MISSING", exitCode: 4 },
23	  NOT_FOUND: { result: "NOT_FOUND", exitCode: 5 },
24	  ISSUE_MISSING: { result: "ISSUE_MISSING", exitCode: 6 },
25	  COMMENT_NOT_FOUND: { result: "COMMENT_NOT_FOUND", exitCode: 7 },
26	  USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: { result: "USER_ALREADY_EXISTS", exitCode: 8 },
27	  USER_NOT_FOUND: { result: "USER_NOT_FOUND", exitCode: 9 },
28	  INVALID_PARAMS: { result: "INVALID_PARAMS", exitCode: 10 },
29	  BLOCKAGE_CYCLE: { result: "BLOCKAGE_CYCLE", exitCode: 11 },
30	  HIERARCHY_CONSTRAINT: { result: "HIERARCHY_CONSTRAINT", exitCode: 12 },
31	} as const;

content.text: The expertise file is now updated and consistent. Let me fix one small thing — I listed 13 error codes but said 12. Let me count: NOT_INITIALIZED, ALREADY_INITIALIZED, TOKEN_REQUIRED, INVALID_TOKEN, DEFAULT_USER_MISSING, NOT_FOUND, ISSUE_MISSING, COMMENT_NOT_FOUND, USER_ALREADY_EXISTS, USER_NOT_FOUND, INVALID_PARAMS, BLOCKAGE_CYCLE, HIERARCHY_CONSTRAINT — that's 13 total. The errors.ts file confirms 13 entries in the ErrorCodes object (lines 18-31). Let me fix the count:
